---
pagetitle: "Page Not Found | Cultural Health Connect"
---

```{=html}
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-h1" role="heading" aria-level="1" data-i18n="page-header-404">Page Not Found</div>
</div>

<div class="container section" style="text-align:center;">
  <p style="font-size:3.5rem; margin:1.5rem 0 0.5rem;" aria-hidden="true">🧭</p>
  <p style="font-size:1.1rem;" data-i18n="notfound-text">Sorry—we couldn't find that page. It may have moved during our website updates.</p>
  <p style="margin-top:2rem;">
    <a href="index.html" class="btn" data-i18n="btn-gohome">Back to Home</a>
    &nbsp;
    <a href="Resources.html" class="btn btn-gold" data-i18n="btn-resources-hero">Free Resources</a>
  </p>
</div>

<footer>
  <span data-i18n="footer-short">© 2025 Cultural Health Connect</span>
</footer>
```
